chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-34 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 07-02-2018 Mr. Taj Muhammad Kaimkhani advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Abdul Rasheed SHO PS Tando Adam District Sanghar. Mr. Lutfullah Arain D.A.G for Pakistan. Learned A.A.G. files comments of respondents No.3 to 6, taken on record. Copy whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. The main grievance for the petitioner is that the official respondents who are all police officials are harassing the petitioner as well as his family members. Learned A.A.G. states that neither the official respondents have harassed the petitioner nor they intend to do so. He further submits that the official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the statement given by learned A.A.G. and seeks disposal of this petition. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Office is directed to provide copy of this order to learned A.A.G. for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
